case_title: CANTRELL, HARRIS & ASSOCIATES VS. PREM ABRAHAM, ET AL.

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CANTRELL, HARRIS & ASSOCIATES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ABRAHAM, PREM COX, JUDITH ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1700 CALIFORNIA STREET, #610, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT AND PREJUDGMENT CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF CANTRELL, HARRIS & ASSOCIATES SERVED APR-25-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ABRAHAM, PREM
DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT - LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CANTRELL, HARRIS & ASSOCIATES
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF DISMISSAL AND POS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CANTRELL, HARRIS & ASSOCIATES
DECLARATION RE EXEMPTION FROM SF RENT BOARD FILED BY PLAINTIFF CANTRELL, HARRIS & ASSOCIATES
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $120.82 PER DAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF CANTRELL, HARRIS & ASSOCIATES
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ABRAHAM, PREM COX, JUDITH
EX PARTE MOTION TO VACATE DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CANTRELL, HARRIS & ASSOCIATES
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT AND PREJUDGMENT CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF CANTRELL, HARRIS & ASSOCIATES SERVED APR-26-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT COX, JUDITH
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED UNSATISFIED; SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT ABRAHAM, PREM COX, JUDITH

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CANTRELL, HARRIS & ASSOCIATES AS TO DEFENDANT ABRAHAM, PREM COX, JUDITH DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT ABRAHAM, PREM
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT AND PREJUDGMENT CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF CANTRELL, HARRIS & ASSOCIATES SERVED APR-26-2010, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT COX, JUDITH ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS
ORDER TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT ("ORDER VACATING DEFAULT JUDGMENT") JUDGMENT OF MAY-12-2010 SET ASIDE
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
